description: Provides an interface for tools to interact with Bun's development server.

types.description: Specifies a location within a source file for a build error.

properties.name: length
properties.description: Length of the error highlight in characters.

properties.name: lineText
properties.description: The content of the line with the error.

types.description: Additional note associated with a build error.
Represents a single error or warning encountered during bundling.

properties.name: message
properties.description: The main error or warning message.

properties.name: filePath
properties.description: The absolute file path where the error occurred, if applicable.

properties.name: location
properties.description: Location within the file where the error occurred.

types.description: Simplified stack frame information from the client-side runtime environment.

properties.name: filePath
properties.description: URL or path of the script file.

commands.name: enable
commands.description: Enables the FrontendDevServer domain, starting event delivery.

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Disables the FrontendDevServer domain, stopping event delivery.

commands.name: addFile
commands.description: Injects or updates a file in the development server's virtual filesystem. This will trigger a rebuild/HMR update.

parameters.name: filePath
parameters.description: The absolute path or path relative to the project root where the file should be placed/updated.

commands.name: addPlugin
commands.description: Adds a Bun bundler plugin dynamically to the current build configuration. This triggers a re-configuration and potentially a full rebuild.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: A unique name for the plugin.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: The JavaScript source code for the plugin (must export a BunPlugin object).

events.name: clientConnected
events.description: Fired when an HMR WebSocket client (browser tab) connects to the DevServer.

parameters.name: connectionId
parameters.description: Unique identifier for this client connection.

events.name: clientDisconnected
events.description: Fired when an HMR WebSocket client disconnects.

events.name: bundleStart
events.description: Fired when the bundler starts processing a set of changes.

parameters.name: triggerFiles
parameters.description: File paths that triggered this bundle operation, if applicable (e.g., not for initial build).

events.name: bundleComplete
events.description: Fired when a bundle operation completes successfully.

parameters.name: sourceFiles
parameters.description: List of absolute paths for all source files included in this bundle update.

parameters.name: outputFiles
parameters.description: List of relative output paths generated by this bundle update (e.g., '/_bun/client/index-1234.js').

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Time taken for the bundle operation in milliseconds.

events.name: bundleError
events.description: Fired when a bundle operation fails.

parameters.name: errors
parameters.description: List of errors and warnings encountered during the build.

events.name: hotReload
events.description: Fired when a hot module replacement update is pushed to connected clients.

parameters.name: changedFiles
parameters.description: List of absolute paths of files that were changed and included in this HMR update.

events.name: clientConsoleMessage
events.description: Fired when a message is logged to the console in a connected client's environment.

parameters.name: connectionId
parameters.description: Identifier of the client connection that logged the message.

parameters.name: level
parameters.description: The severity level of the console message.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: The content of the console message.

events.name: clientRuntimeError
events.description: Fired when an uncaught exception occurs in a connected client's runtime.

parameters.name: connectionId
parameters.description: Identifier of the client connection where the error occurred.

parameters.name: stackTrace
parameters.description: The stack trace associated with the error, remapped to source files if possible.
